description_long: This is an indoor stage setup within a brick-walled room, featuring a raised wooden platform at the back with a piano and a full drum kit. The stage is framed by red curtains and illuminated by overhead lights, creating a performance area. In front of the stage, there are two round tables with wooden chairs arranged for an audience, and several large potted plants add greenery to the space. The walls are decorated with a series of wall-mounted lights, and the floor is a mix of dark and light tiles. The overall ambiance suggests a cozy, intimate venue suitable for live music or small performances. The design is reminiscent of a small urban jazz club or café.
description: A brick-walled indoor stage with a piano, drum kit, red curtains, audience tables, and potted plants, evoking a cozy urban jazz club.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stage with piano and drum kit, audience tables, chairs, and potted plants clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the stage depth, instrument placement, and arrangement of tables and plants.
description_view_2: Rear exterior view showing the solid brick wall with minimal interior details visible.
description_view_3: Back view of the brick wall, with only the tops of some interior lights faintly visible.
